textPlain: I'm trying to understand and master the basics and the fundamentals of tech, to be multidisciplinary in a world that has become hyper-specialized. To escape the tempting slop of AI while I'm still working on that, and I'm still using it excessively, but I want to master something and at the same time move slowly so I have started by understanding the design philosophy of tools that we use on a daily basis so If you have any advices please go ahead!
